calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gene S. Van, Shipper/Representative of Van Sales & Co.(Respondent)
Jennifer Lin Lieu, Esq. for Appelant, Kevin Zheng. Kevin Zheng is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondent is sworn.

Gene S. Van testifies on behalf of Van Sales & Co., Respondent. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Document with invoice
Exhibit 2 - Email from Van Sales & Co. to Kevin Zheng
Exhibit 3 - Document/Emergency Action Notification
Exhibit 4 - Email from K. Zheng to Van Sales & Co.
Exhibit 5 - Group of invoices
Exhibit 6 - Email of Van Sales & Co. to K. Zheng
Exhibit 7 - Document
Exhibit 8 - Email of Van Sales & Co. to K. Zheng
Exhibit 9 - Copy of small claims documents
Ms. Lieu cross-examines the Respondent Representative. Appelant introduces the following documentary evidence:
Exhibit A - Copy of Email
Exhibit B - Invoice of Van Sales & Co.
Exhibit C - Document from State of CA
Exhibit D - Document, Payment to the Shipment

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Paul A. Renne, Clerk Maria Pena, Not Reported (414)
